cves.description: HTTP/2 server implementation vulnerable to rapid reset attacks. Attacker can trigger remote code execution.
cves.poc:
$ codeprobe poc CVE-2023-44487
[*] Setting up sandbox...
[+] Server started on :8000
[*] Sending exploit payload...
[+] RCE confirmed: /bin/sh opened
$ whoami
root
$ exit
[+] Patch required: Upgrade to http2-server >= 1.0.1

cves.description: Prototype pollution in lodash utility functions. Could allow arbitrary code execution.
cves.poc: Manual code review identified unsafe merge patterns.
